text_excerpt: News | Rushcliffe Skip to main content Rushcliffe Conservatives Main navigation Contact Home Clubs Councillors Membership News Our map Events The Rushcliffe Legacy What matters to you local survey News Cllr Elena Georgiou joins Rushcliffe Conservatives Wednesday, 24 December, 2025 Cllr Elena Georgiou joins the Conservative Group at Rushcliffe Borough Council. Cllr Elena Georgiou, formerly of the Bingham Independent Group, has joined the ruling Conservative Group at Rushcliffe Borough Council. Cllr Georgiou has represented the Bingham South Ward on Rushcliffe Borough Council since 2023 and sets out why she feels now is the time to join the Conservative Group. “Since my...
